CustomField.description: Controls what happens to open installment Opportunities when a Recurring Donation is closed. Valid values include: "Mark_Opportunities_Closed_Lost" (closes all open installments as Closed Lost), "Delete_Open_Opportunities" (deletes open installments), and "No_Action" (leaves open installments unchanged). Applies to Enhanced Recurring Donations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: What happens to open installment Opportunities when a Recurring Donation is closed: close them as lost, delete them, or take no action.
CustomField.label: Open Opportunity Behavior on RD Close
